mapper.select: SELECT id, phone, role, status, last_login_at FROM user_account WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, phone, role, status, last_login_at FROM user_account WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_account(phone, role, status) VALUES(#{phone}, #{role}, 'ACTIVE')
INSERT INTO user_account(phone, password_hash, role, status) VALUES(#{phone}, '', #{role}, 'ACTIVE')
